home.subtitle: Instant AI skin analysis, expert doctor consultations, and smart medication tracking — all in one secure platform.
home.feat1Desc: Upload a photo for immediate AI-powered skin analysis and insights.
home.feat2Desc: Consult with top dermatologists online or book clinic visits.
home.feat3Desc: Never miss a dose with our smart daily medication reminders.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your Twacha AI dashboard
auth.registerSubtitle: Join Twacha AI to get started

scan.title: AI Skin Analysis
scan.subtitle: Upload a photo or use live camera for an instant AI assessment.
scan.browseText: or click to browse from your device
scan.cameraNote: Point your camera at the skin area. AI classifies in real-time using TensorFlow.js.
scan.conditionsNote: Detected conditions: Eczema, Melanoma, Atopic Dermatitis, BCC, Melanoma Nevi, BKL
scan.analysisExplanation: AI analysis identified this as "{{disease}}" with {{confidence}}% confidence. This is an AI-assisted result — please consult a certified dermatologist for a medical diagnosis.

chatbot.title: Twacha Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask anything about your skin or the app
chatbot.default_ai: Hi! I'm your AI skin assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.sim_generic: I'm a simulated AI assistant. In a live environment, I would connect to a backend to analyze your request about: '{{text}}'. How else can I help?
chatbot.sim_routine: For a basic daily routine, I recommend: 1) Gentle Cleanser, 2) Vitamin C Serum (morning), 3) Moisturizer, and 4) SPF 30+ (morning). Check our Tips section for more!
chatbot.sim_analyze: To analyze your skin, please navigate to the 'Scan' tab from the top menu and upload a clear photo of the affected area.

walkthrough.home: Welcome to Twacha AI! This is your dashboard.
walkthrough.scan: Click the Scan tab to analyze your skin condition using our AI model.
walkthrough.doctors: Here you can find expert dermatologists for online or offline consultations.
walkthrough.tips: Check out the Tips section for daily skincare routines and dietary advice.
walkthrough.medications: Use the Medications tab to track your daily prescriptions and never miss a dose.
walkthrough.auth: Finally, sign in here to securely save your records.
